src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Migrated import statements from javax.* to jakarta.* to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required for modern runtimes.
Reordered import statements to group them logically or alphabetically, removing unnecessary blank lines.
Migrate JAX-RS and CDI imports from the javax namespace to the jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern application servers and JDK 21 environments.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Changed imports from javax.enterprise.context.ApplicationScoped, javax.ws.rs.ApplicationPath, and javax.ws.rs.core.Application to their jakarta equivalents.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Replaced javax.enterprise, javax.inject, and javax.transaction imports with their jakarta equivalents to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by the target runtime.
Changed the CDI bean scope from Dependent to ApplicationScoped to align with modern best practices for stateless boundary classes.
Removed explicit private modifiers from injected fields, relying on default package-private visibility which is sufficient for injection targets.
Refactored the Message object creation from a single constructor call to a builder-like pattern using setters to allow setting additional properties like locale.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Message result = new Message(UUID.randomUUID()); result.setCode("hello"); result.setText(...); result.setLocale(Locale.GERMAN); return result;

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Updated the welcome message text to explicitly mention Quarkus and improved the formatting of the injected configuration values.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: String.format("Welcome to Cloud Native Java with Quarkus! Got values configStringValue=[%s] configNumericValue=[%d]", ...)

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Added explicit initialization of the message locale to German, requiring the addition of the java.util.Locale import.
Added a new 'locale' field to the Message entity to support internationalization.
Removed the 'code' field from the Message entity as it is no longer needed.
Simplified the Message constructor to only accept an ID, removing code and text parameters.
Refactored equals and hashCode methods to rely solely on the ID field, removing dependencies on code and text.
Updated imports to remove unused Objects and add Locale for the new field.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl:
- /**
-  * Simple {@code Entity} that represents a welcome messages.
-  */

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Migrated test assertions from RestAssured's inline Hamcrest matchers to explicit AssertJ assertions on a deserialized object for better readability and maintainability.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Replaced `.body("text", response -> startsWith(...))` with `assertThat(welcomeMessage.getText()).startsWith(...)` and added null checks for other fields.

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Changed test method visibility from public to package-private to follow modern JUnit 5 best practices.
Updated the expected welcome message text to reflect the migration from a generic Java framework to Quarkus.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Changed expected string prefix from "Welcome to Cloud Native Java with " to "Welcome to Cloud Native Java with Quarkus".

pom.xml.general_idea: Updated the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgraded Quarkus from 2.x to 3.x, which requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes.
Replaced blocking RESTEasy dependencies with Quarkus Reactive RESTEasy Jackson to align with Quarkus 3 best practices.
Added Hibernate Validator dependency, likely replacing implicit validation or ensuring compatibility with new Quarkus version.
Upgraded SLF4J to version 2.x to support Java 21 and modern logging frameworks.
Added explicit Log4j 2 dependency, likely for specific logging implementation or bridge requirements.
Upgraded JUnit Jupiter to version 5.10.1 for better Java 21 support and bug fixes.
Added AssertJ as a testing assertion library to improve test readability.
Upgraded RestAssured to version 5.x to ensure compatibility with newer Java versions and HTTP clients.
Added explicit Jackson dependency version management for JSON processing.
Added Flyway dependency for database migration management.
Added PostgreSQL JDBC driver dependency for database connectivity.
Updated the internal common REST library version to 1.2.0.
Added internal common persistence JPA library dependency.
Added internal common observability library dependency.
Updated the internal common test core library version to 1.2.0.
Removed the legacy javax-based test dependency, likely migrated to Jakarta EE or removed as obsolete.
Added Quarkus JUnit5 Mockito integration for mocking in tests.
Removed explicit JUnit Jupiter Engine dependency, relying on Quarkus or other transitive dependencies.
Upgraded Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.11.0 for Java 21 support.
Upgraded Maven Surefire Plugin to 3.2.1 for better test execution on Java 21.
Upgraded Maven Failsafe Plugin to 3.2.1 for integration test execution.
Upgraded Fabric8 Docker Maven Plugin to 0.43.4.
Upgraded Compose Maven Plugin to 5.1.0.
Upgraded Helm Maven Plugin to 5.0.0.
Added OWASP Dependency Check plugin for security vulnerability scanning.
Upgraded JaCoCo Maven Plugin to 0.8.11 for code coverage.
Upgraded SonarQube Maven Plugin to 3.10.0.2594.
Added multi-architecture support for Docker builds (AMD64 and ARM64).
Changed Kubernetes namespace from 'default' to 'cloudtrain' for better isolation.
Updated Kubernetes ingress host to a specific development domain.
Configured Surefire to exclude system tests and set logging manager.
Configured Failsafe to include system tests and set target route.
Added explicit execution for building Docker images during the package phase.
Added explicit execution for pushing Docker images during the deploy phase.
Added execution to start Docker Compose containers before integration tests.
Added execution to stop Docker Compose containers after integration tests.
Added execution to copy JaCoCo agent to Docker resources for coverage in containers.
Added execution to lint Helm charts during package phase.
Added execution to package Helm charts during package phase.
Added execution to push Helm charts during deploy phase.
Added execution to run OWASP dependency check during verify phase.
Added execution to run SonarQube analysis during verify phase.
Added execution to prepare JaCoCo agent for unit tests.
Added execution to prepare JaCoCo agent for integration tests.
Added execution to dump JaCoCo data from containers.
Added execution to generate JaCoCo report for unit tests.
Added execution to generate JaCoCo report for integration tests.
Added execution to copy Docker resources for image building.
Added execution to copy Compose resources for container orchestration.
Added execution to copy Helm resources for chart packaging.
Removed the 'local-stage' Maven profile to simplify the build configuration.
Replaced complex plugin executions in 'pre-commit-stage' with simple property skips for Sonar, dependency-check, and Jacoco.
Configured the docker-maven-plugin to use Buildx for multi-platform image building in the 'commit-stage' profile.
Removed the explicit 'push-docker-image' execution from the 'commit-stage' profile, likely delegating push to CI or other mechanisms.
Removed the jacoco-maven-plugin configuration from the 'commit-stage' profile, relying on property skips instead.
Removed the sonar-maven-plugin configuration from the 'commit-stage' profile, relying on property skips instead.
Replaced complex plugin executions in 'integration-test-stage' with simple property skips for Sonar, compose, docker, dependency-check, and Jacoco.
Simplified Helm deployment in 'integration-test-stage' by removing manual resource copying and uninstall steps, using only pull and deploy goals.
pom.xml.human_impl: Replaced maven-resources-plugin and helm-maven-plugin uninstall with simplified helm-maven-plugin pull/deploy

pom.xml.general_idea: Moved failsafe plugin configuration to global configuration block in 'integration-test-stage' instead of explicit executions.
Added the CloudTrain Maven repository as a plugin repository to resolve custom plugins.
Added the CloudTrain Maven repository as a dependency repository to resolve custom dependencies.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the flattened POM artifact to .gitignore to prevent committing generated build files.

README.md.general_idea: Refined the project title and description to accurately reflect its purpose as a MicroProfile Config demonstration.
README.md.human_impl: Changed header to 'Cloud native Java backend based demonstrating application configuration with MicroProfile Config'

README.md.human_impl: Added list of supported platforms: linux/amd64, linux/arm64/v8

README.md.general_idea: Added detailed explanation of MicroProfile Config sources, precedence, and injection mechanisms.
README.md.human_impl: Added sections explaining properties, system properties, env vars, and @ConfigProperty usage

README.md.general_idea: Inserted Java code snippets demonstrating configuration injection and programmatic access.
README.md.human_impl: Added code blocks for @ConfigProperty and Config object injection

README.md.general_idea: Added specific Maven commands for local building of the application.
Added instructions for running and stopping the application locally using Docker Compose.
Added steps to demonstrate the application, including endpoints and expected JSON response.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Install and configure JDK 21 in the build environment to support the target Java version.
Add environment variable for the artifact ID to be used in git operations.
Add environment variable for the git tag user name.
Add environment variable for the git tag user email.
Add environment variable to control OWASP dependency check skipping.
Add GitHub token secret for authenticated git operations.
Add NIST NVD API key secret for vulnerability scanning.
Refactor version string construction to use dynamic branch and revision variables instead of hardcoded branch.
Change the main build phase from 'install' to 'deploy' to publish artifacts.
Update SonarQube authentication property from 'sonar.login' to 'sonar.token'.
Add property to skip OWASP dependency check based on environment variable.
Add steps to configure git, create an annotated tag with the project version, and push it to the remote repository.
buildspec.yml.human_impl: git config user.name ...; git tag -a $PROJECT_VERSION ...; git push origin HEAD:$VERSION_CHANGELIST $PROJECT_VERSION

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from a Java 17 variant to a Java 21 variant to align with the target JDK version.
Update JVM garbage collection flags to use ZGC with generational support, which is optimized for Java 21.
Explicitly set the file encoding to UTF-8 via JVM options to ensure consistent character handling.
Remove the explicit Metaspace size setting as it is less relevant or handled differently with the new GC and JDK version.

src/main/helm/cnj-config-backend-quarkus.general_idea: Replace hardcoded Helm chart version with a Maven property placeholder to enable dynamic versioning during the build process.
